goal: Build an executive sales dashboard for sales leaders.
primary_question: Which regions and states are driving sales and profit, and how do filtered trends and sub-categories change?

worksheets.name: Sales Map
worksheets.question: Where are sales and profit concentrated geographically?

worksheets.name: Sales Trend
worksheets.question: How do monthly sales change after the current selection?

worksheets.name: Sub-Category Breakdown
worksheets.question: Which sub-categories drive sales after the current selection?
